title: kb.ingest.tengine.completed v1
description: Emitted once per `kb ingest tengine` live run (never on --dry-run, so downstream consumers are never misled by would-write counts as if real) after the ingest pass finishes scanning tengine memory files. Source: kb/src/ingest/tengine.rs (end of the ingest driver, right before pillar routing).

files_scanned.description: Total files walked in this pass.

would_write.description: Number of vault entries written (this event only fires on live runs, so this count is real).

yaml_parsed.description: Files parsed via the YAML frontmatter dialect.

bold_parsed.description: Files parsed via the bold-header dialect.

missing_frontmatter.description: Files with no recognizable frontmatter of either dialect.

errors.description: Files skipped due to a parse/read error.
